ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Pate 50% (Semoule de _blé_ dur, farine de _blé_ tendre, _œufs_ entiers, eau, sel), Farce 50% ( _Ricotta_, crème de truffes 6%, truffes (Tuber albidum pico) 0,5%, farine de riz, noix de muscade, sel)
